title: CSS
description: Style the web. Flexbox, Grid, animations, responsive design, variables, preprocessors, and modern layouts.

items.label: CSS Selectors
Specificity Hierarchy
items.code:
Inline styles:     1,0,0,0
#id selectors:     0,1,0,0
.class, [attr], :pseudo:  0,0,1,0
Element, ::pseudo: 0,0,0,1
!important:        Overrides everything

// Example:
#nav .item a:hover { }  /* 0,1,2,1 */

// Use: specificity, don't rely on !important

items.label: Box Model Properties
Flexbox Layout
Grid Layout
Media Queries
Responsive Units
items.code:
/* Relative units */
%     - percentage of parent
em    - relative to parent font-size
rem   - relative to root font-size (16px default)
ch    - relative to character width '0'
vw    - 1% of viewport width
vh    - 1% of viewport height
vmin  - smaller of vw/vh
vmax  - larger of vw/vh

/* Examples */
.container {
  width: min(90%, 1200px);   /* responsive + capped */
  padding: clamp(1rem, 5vw, 3rem);  /* fluid range */
  font-size: clamp(1rem, 2.5vw, 1.5rem);
  height: 100vh;  /* full viewport */
}

h1 { font-size: 2.5rem; }  /* 40px */
.small { font-size: 0.875rem; }  /* 14px */

items.label: Colors
Typography
Transitions
Keyframe Animations
Positioning
items.code:
/* Position values */
.static { position: static; }     /* default */
.relative { position: relative; top: 10px; }  /* offset from normal */
.absolute { position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; }  /* relative to positioned ancestor */
.fixed { position: fixed; bottom: 0; width: 100%; }  /* relative to viewport */
.sticky { position: sticky; top: 0; }  /* scrolls then sticks */

/* Display values */
display: block;       /* full width, new line */
display: inline;      /* content width, no new line */
display: inline-block; /* inline but can set width/height */
display: none;        /* hidden, removed from flow */
display: flex;        /* flexbox */
display: grid;        /* grid */

/* Visibility vs display */
visibility: hidden;   /* hidden BUT takes space */
display: none;        /* hidden, NO space */
opacity: 0;          /* fully transparent but interactive */
